title: Now (v3)
surface: src/routes/now/+page.svelte (exists in v2; gets v3 treatment)
summary: Live state mirror per differentiation move 4. In-flight initiatives + Blueprint stage status + recent writing + reading queue + last-updated stamp. The site reads its own state — the page itself is one of the in-flight items.

strategy.decision: Promote v2's /now from lateral surface to primary live-state mirror. Surfaces real-feeling commit hashes, real Rally HQ uptime metrics, real Blueprint stage status. The page is self-referential — it shows itself in the in-flight list.
strategy.why: Implements differentiation move 4 (live runtime signals). Cohort-aligned in posture (Lopopolo's 'lifestream,' Lovin's 'TIL,' Lehr's 'lifelog') but specific to the practice. Returning visitors (Peer Architect cohort) get a bookmarkable status surface.
strategy.shipped: v2 has /now at src/routes/now/+page.svelte. Page exists but isn't part of any persona's primary funnel (per blueprint/research/funnel/funnel-current-state.md). Treated as lateral surface.
strategy.gap: v2: /now exists but is unfeatured and not state-driven. v3: /now is a load-bearing live-state surface with structured signal groups.
strategy.question: Data source authentication for live signals at launch — RSS is ready (Signal Dispatch). Rally HQ status + Blueprint stage status need lightweight endpoints. Stage 6 deploy notes capture the MVP shape; Stage 7 iterate hardens.

currentState.summary: v2 /now exists as a status page but is lateral — not in primary funnels.
currentState.annotation: v3 promotes /now to primary live-state surface and adds structured signal groups.
